headline: Booking Holdings (NASDAQ:BKNG) Screens as Affordable Growth Pick with Strong Fundamentals
summary: Booking Holdings (BKNG) offers strong growth at a reasonable price, scoring high on ChartMill's Affordable Growth screen with solid earnings, fair valuation, and robust financial health.
